response:
Hello there, movie lover! I'd be delighted to recommend some action-packed films for you!

You're looking for an action movie, which is a great choice! Considering your preferences, I'll suggest three movies that fit the bill.

Here are my top recommendations:

1. Mad Max: Fury Road (2015) - an adrenaline-fueled thrill ride that's hard to beat.
2. The Dark Knight (2008) - an epic superhero battle that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
3. John Wick (2014) - a non-stop action sequence that will keep you guessing until the very end.

• Mad Max: Fury Road (2015) - 
• The Dark Knight (2008) - 
• John Wick (2014)

**Sources:**
• Mad Max: Fury Road (2015)
• The Dark Knight (2008)
• John Wick (2014)

sources.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
sources.overview: An apocalyptic story set in the furthest reaches of our planet, in a stark desert landscape where humanity is broken, and most everyone is crazed fighting for the necessities of life. Within this world exist two rebels on the run who just might be able to restore order.

sources.title: The Dark Knight
sources.overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime. With the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent, Batman sets out to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations that plague the streets. The partnership proves to be effective, but they soon find themselves prey to a reign of chaos unleashed by a rising criminal mastermind known to the terrified citizens of Gotham as the Joker.

sources.title: John Wick
sources.overview: Ex-hitman John Wick comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that took everything from him.
